title: test
text:
What You’ll Learn
This course uses video as the primary content format. Each lesson includes a video alongside structured notes and resources.

title: test
text:
How This Course Works

Watch the video for each lesson
Review the key concepts and notes below the video
Use the supplementary resources to go deeper







Video Hosting



Videos are hosted on YouTube (unlisted). You do not need a YouTube account to watch them.
